name: Ubiquiti UniFi Outdoor Cable 305m
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Outdoor Cable 305m
short_description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Outdoor Cable is a Category 5e cable designed for professional networking applications in challenging environments. Its length of 305 meters provides extensive flexibility for installations of any scale. The cable features a durable thermoplastic elastomer (TPE) jacket with UV resistance that adheres to ASTM G 151/154 standards, ensuring longevity and reliability in outdoor setups. This design ensures exceptional durability and performance in outdoor installations, making it a reliable solution for network setups exposed to harsh weather conditions while maintaining consistent and secure connectivity. The Ubiquiti UniFi Outdoor Cable is tailored to provide seamless connectivity and protect your network investments, making it an essential component for scalable, high-performance networking solutions.

detailed_description.heading: Premium-Grade Outdoor Network Cable
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Outdoor Cable is a Category 5e cable designed for professional networking applications in challenging environments. Its length of 305 meters provides extensive flexibility for installations of any scale. The cable features a durable thermoplastic elastomer (TPE) jacket with UV resistance that adheres to ASTM G 151/154 standards, ensuring longevity and reliability in outdoor setups. This design ensures exceptional durability and performance in outdoor installations, making it a reliable solution for network setups exposed to harsh weather conditions while maintaining consistent and secure connectivity. The Ubiquiti UniFi Outdoor Cable is tailored to provide seamless connectivity and protect your network investments, making it an essential component for scalable, high-performance networking solutions.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Durability
detailed_description.text: Equipped with STP (Shielded Twisted Pair) design, the UniFi Outdoor Cable boasts internal foil shielding and a drain wire for superior ESD (electrostatic discharge) protection. These features are crucial for safeguarding network devices from electrical interference, particularly in areas prone to storms or high electromagnetic activity. The cable meets the VW-1 (UL1581) flame rating, further enhancing its safety and reliability. With its 6 mm jacket diameter and a minimum bend radius of 24 mm, the cable is highly flexible and easy to install, even in demanding setups. Built with 24 AWG solid bare copper conductors, the Ubiquiti Outdoor Cable ensures high data transmission efficiency and long-term durability. Its flame-resistant and weatherproof jacket is engineered for demanding conditions, whether for long-term outdoor installations or industrial-grade applications.
